text.title: AI Call Site Inventory Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the ai-call-site-inventory methodology.

example.title: Pre-migration inventory for Claude 4.6 → 4.7
example.narrative: 27 call sites found. 22 tracked, 3 version-less (chat-tab prompts), 2 schema-less. Recommendations: move 3 to prompts/ folder, add JSON schema to 2.
example.artifact: call-site-inventory.md with table per call site + gap summary.
